positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring highly contrasting silhouettes of diverse deciduous and evergreen trees against a vivid, gradient sunset sky. The composition must be centered and balanced, creating an iconic, repeatable pattern suitable for textile printing. Use deep emerald greens, burnt oranges, and charcoal black for maximum impact. The style should evoke high-contrast graphic illustration, resembling woodblock prints mixed with contemporary vector art. Crisp edges, strong outlines, perfect symmetry, and excellent readability are essential. Shot from a slightly low angle to emphasize the towering canopy.
